chapter_title.en: Chapter on Beginning a Journey with Charity

text: 2404 - رَوَى اَلْحَسَنُ بْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اَلرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ اَلْحَجَّاجِ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «تَصَدَّقْ وَ اُخْرُجْ أَيَّ يَوْمٍ شِئْتَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.2404 - It is narrated by Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub from Abdul Rahman ibn Al-Hajjaj that Abu Abdullah (as) said: "Give charity and then set out on your journey on any day you wish."
